formula_expression: overlap(obs window, flight window) / duration(flight window)
meaning: Fraction of the drone flight covered by this GCP's observations. Must equal 1.0; less means PPK gaps for this point.
Seconds the GCP device was recording before flight start. Threshold >= 120s ideal, >= 60s acceptable.
Seconds the GCP device kept recording after flight end. Threshold >= 60s.
Whether dual-frequency observations are available.
Total cycle slips. Elevated = obstruction/disturbance/multipath.
Short recording gaps within the occupation.
Any major recording gap.
Mean signal strength across the occupation.

formula_expression: std-dev of cn0_per_sat across sats at equal elevation
meaning: Proxy for multipath risk from a fixed reflector geometry. Risk indicator, not error magnitude. Numeric thresholds: low <= 2.5 dB-Hz; moderate 2.5–4.0; high > 4.0.
Average sky-geometry quality. Thresholds: <2 = 100; 2-4 = 80; 4-6 = 55; >6 = 30.
Worst-case geometry during occupation.

formula_expression: time from power-on to stable sat_count (>=6 sats with low PDOP)
meaning: How quickly the device reached a stable solution after power-on. Thresholds: <60s = 100; 60-119s = 88; 120-299s = 65; >=300s = 30.
Whether RINEX version is accepted by the PPK pipeline.

formula_expression: antenna_type AND receiver_type AND approx_position_xyz all present
meaning: Whether required header records are present.
Number of constellations tracked.

formula_expression: device_type-aware: for DGPS, requires completed_normally AND shutdowns==0 AND battery_min >= 20%; for CB_X / AEROPOINT / OTHER, oplog expected-absent, evaluates as TRUE if RINEX-side signals are clean (no gap_gt_60s)
meaning: Whether the occupation terminated cleanly with adequate power. Device-type aware.
Form vs RINEX antenna type consistency. NOT ANTEX calibration (Stage 2).
Form-height vs RINEX-recorded-height cross-check. Agreement raises confidence; conflict flags the wrong-reference blunder.
Form vs RINEX device ID match. Uniform threshold: match=100; mismatch=50 + reviewer-blocking flag (HIGH severity).
Geomagnetic activity index. External NOAA SWPC API dependency.
Whether antenna height is factory-known for this device type. When true, antenna_height_documented_score = 100 by definition.

formula_expression: gap_gt_5s_count rising AND cycle_slip_count rising AND cn0 variance rising in same time window
meaning: Correlation detector for physical disturbance during occupation (#15). FLAG-ONLY, no weight. BLIND to slow settling that produces no gap/slip.

formula_expression: |session_end_utc - obs_end_utc| within tolerance (when oplog is expected-present)
meaning: Device-clock vs observation-end cross-check. Disagreement = silent truncation. Applies to DGPS only.
